
### opportunity  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{@2@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{@3@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{@4@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{@5@}{@},
} -->
 
<pre><code>// initially %r8 = 800,
//           %r9 = 900, etc.
0x0: addq %r8, %r9 
0x2: addq %r9, %r8
...
</code></pre>
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardOpp.figure.svg)


### exploiting the opportunity 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardCirc.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardCirc.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardCirc.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::


### opportunity 2  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{@2@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{@3@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{@4@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{@5@}{@},
} -->
 
<pre><code>// initially %r8 = 800,
//           %r9 = 900, etc.
0x0: addq %r8, %r9 
0x2: nop
0x3: addq %r9, %r8
...
</code></pre>
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/forwardOpp2.figure.svg)


### againframe(forwardCirc)
